totalRecords.description: Total number of audit schedules included in this widget payload.

generatedAt.description: Payload generation timestamp in ISO-8601 format.

complianceBuckets.description: Section 1: Auditees grouped into 3 high-compliance buckets (81–95%, 96–99%, 100%) with auditee counts per occupied bucket.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this section represents.

buckets.description: Up to 3 compliance buckets. Only include a bucket if its auditeeCount > 0.

top5HighPerformers.description: Section 2: The 5 auditees with the absolute highest achieved compliance percentage across all buckets combined, sorted descending by achievedPercentage.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this section represents.

items.description: Top 5 highest-scoring auditees overall, sorted descending by achievedPercentage.

zoneComplianceOverview.description: Section 3: Per-zone count of audit schedules where Achieved Percentage > 50%, sorted by count descending.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this section represents.

highComplianceThreshold.description: The threshold used to classify high-compliance audits (50.0).

zones.description: Zones sorted descending by highComplianceAuditCount (most to least high-compliance). Include all zones with highComplianceAuditCount > 0.

bucketMin.description: Lower bound of the compliance percentage range (inclusive).

bucketMax.description: Upper bound of the compliance percentage range (inclusive).

auditeeCount.description: Total number of auditees in this compliance bucket.

auditeeName.description: Name of the auditee entity (from Auditee Name column).

achievedPercentage.description: Achieved compliance percentage for this auditee (from Achieved Percentage column).

zoneName.description: Name of the zone (from Zone Name column).

highComplianceAuditCount.description: Number of audit schedules in this zone where Achieved Percentage > 50%.
